ssmcontacts.contact.Alias.Docs: The unique and identifiable alias of the contact or escalation plan.

ssmcontacts.contact.DisplayName.Docs: The full name of the contact or escalation plan.

ssmcontacts.contact.Plan.Docs: A list of stages. A contact has an engagement plan with stages that contact specified contact channels. An escalation plan uses stages that contact specified contacts.

ssmcontacts.contact.Type.Docs: Refers to the type of contact. A single contact is type `PERSONAL` and an escalation plan is type `ESCALATION`.
